message:
fix: replace WebSocket exhibit with self-contained MessageChannel

The WebSocket echo server (wss://echo.websocket.events) is down,
causing the exhibit to always show an error. Replaced with a
browser-native MessageChannel that always works — no external
server dependency. WASM tasks track both ends of the channel.
Scope close tears down ports + releases tasks.

Also renamed WebSocket → Channel in nav labels.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
